title: switch from "kube/play" endpoint to "play/kube" endpoint.
body:
When podman kube play was added the endpoint for the kube play/play kube
commands was switched from the "play kube" endpoint to the new "kube play"
endpoint. This caused issues with the remote client, requiring the need
to use the "play kube" endpoint again in order to avoid these issues.
[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Fixes #15071 
Signed-off-by: Niall Crowe <nicrowe@redhat.com>

Finally, be sure to sign commits with your real name. Since by opening
a PR you already have commits, you can add signatures if needed with
something like `git commit -s --amend`.
-->

> Please change https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/apiv2/80-kube.at#L6 to exercise `kube/play` so the endpoint has some testing exposure.

Still open.  Once done, we can merge.
The apiv2 test: https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/test/apiv2/80-kube.at#L6 already tests the kube/play endpoint as well as the play/kube endpoint so no change is necessary.
